case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. GURGHARAN OMESH et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAR-05-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OMESH, GURGHARAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTASTIC DRY CLEANER
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD ( EVID CODE 1551, 1550 ) . FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $218.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OMESH, GURGHARAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTASTIC DRY CLEANER
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMESH, GURGHARAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTASTIC DRY CLEANER POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE FORENTA SSA-800 SA STORAGE CONVEYER WHITE , FAIR MARKET VALUE $ 3,000.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $104.16, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $6,154.85 DAMAGES, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $218.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,323.15, $ 104.16 IS THE INTEREST, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT .
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT OMESH, GURGHARAN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FANTASTIC DRY CLEANER DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-25-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-10-2004
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE
